title: picea brachytyla subsp. complanata
intro: Picea brachytyla subsp. complanata is a subspecies of spruce tree native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas. It is also known as Himalayan spruce or Himalayan white spruce. The medicinal properties of Picea brachytyla subsp. complanata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are often used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from skin irritations, which can be achieved through herbal preparations such as tea, infusions, or tinctures.
